title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Jeff Su demonstrates Claude Cowork, a workspace architecture that uses Claude as an AI second brain via instruction files, persistent memory, and a three-level hierarchy of workstations and projects. The system includes templates for Email HQ, spending trackers, and newsletter drafts with persistent voice.
